admin.aboutText: DevOps and Cloud Engineer with hands-on experience in Linux server administration, AWS infrastructure, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, and CI/CD automation. Also skilled as a SOC Analyst with expertise in SIEM monitoring, alert triage, and incident response using Wazuh and MITRE ATT&CK. Experienced in containerized deployments, reverse proxy configuration, PostgreSQL management, and real-time threat detection. Passionate about scalable systems, cloud-native technologies, and production-grade security.
admin.roleText: DevOps Engineer • SOC Analyst • Cloud & Security

experience.company: McMillan Technologies and Consultancy Services Pvt Ltd
highlights: Deployed and maintained containerized applications using Docker in Linux environments.
Configured Nginx reverse proxy with SSL termination and domain routing for hosted applications.
Troubleshot PostgreSQL connectivity issues, caching problems, upload limitations, and deployment-related errors.
Managed Linux servers for application deployments, monitoring services, debugging logs, and resolving deployment failures.
Worked with AWS infrastructure components including EC2 provisioning, VPC networking, RDS management, and CloudFront CDN configuration.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science and Engineering
education.university: APJ Abdul Kalam Technological University, Kerala, India

projects.title: Website Hosting on AWS
projects.description: Deployed and hosted a Node.js web application on AWS EC2 using Linux-based infrastructure. Provisioned infrastructure using Terraform for repeatable and automated environment setup. Automated Docker image build, vulnerability scanning using Trivy, and deployed to EC2 instance. Managed secure remote access using SSH and AWS Security Groups. Implemented static asset delivery using AWS S3 and CloudFront CDN to reduce latency.

projects.title: Containerized Application Platform
projects.description: Built Docker-based application environments with PostgreSQL backend services. Created Kubernetes deployments using YAML manifests and managed container networking and persistent storage. Performed container vulnerability scanning using Trivy to identify security issues in Docker images. Troubleshot deployment issues related to caching, container services, and database connectivity.

projects.title: SOC Lab & Threat Detection using Wazuh SIEM
projects.description: Deployed and configured Wazuh SIEM in a virtualized lab environment with Windows endpoints. Installed and managed Wazuh agents, validating successful log collection and ingestion. Monitored authentication, process creation, and network activity logs to identify suspicious behavior. Detected brute-force login attempts, reconnaissance activity, and anomalous endpoint events. Investigated alerts using Wazuh dashboards and correlated findings with MITRE ATT&CK techniques. Performed basic incident response including alert triage, log analysis, and escalation procedures.
